chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1503 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for along with petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto and ASI/IO Barkat Ali Korai PS Jhangro ************** Official respondents have filed their respective reports/statements, same are taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to counsel for the petitioners. I.O. is present in Court and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under Section 161 Cr.P.C., wherein she has not supported contents of the FIR and has stated that she was not abducted and that she contracted marriage of her own free will with petitioner No.2. He further submits that, in view of the said statement, the case is liable to be disposed of under “C” class. After such a statement, learned counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, instant Constitution Petition, stands disposed of with directions to the I.O to submit the report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days. In the meantime, official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
